author: valleytheknight
description: Scales text inside Canvas cards to the card's own size as you resize it, instead of only scaling with zoom. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ValleytheKnight
manifest.description: Scales text inside Canvas cards to the card's own size as you resize it, instead of only scaling with zoom.
manifest.name: Canvas Text Scaler

name: Canvas Text Scaler

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes an overflow bug: a card with more text than fits used to scroll no matter how big you resized it, because font size scaled at the same rate as card size. This adds a correction pass that shrinks text further on cards that would otherwise overflow, down to your minimum font size, with a Shrink to fit toggle in settings if you want the old behavior back.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial release: scales Canvas card text to the card size as you resize it, instead of only scaling with zoom.
